receiptStandards.description: Local Employer company name must appear on invoices
receiptStandards.rule: Invoices must show "Global People IT-Services GmbH", not the worker's name

receiptStandards.description: Local Employer address must appear on invoices
receiptStandards.rule: Invoices must show "Kärntner Ring 12, A-1010 Vienna, Austria"

receiptStandards.description: Local Employer VAT ID must appear on invoices
Worker name must appear on hotel/flight invoices
receiptStandards.rule: Hotel and flight invoices should indicate the name of the worker, not the end client

receiptStandards.description: Must be actual tax receipts or invoices
receiptStandards.rule: Documents must be actual tax receipts or invoices; booking confirmations will not suffice
Online copies are sufficient, a hard copy is not required

receiptStandards.description: Currency must be shown on receipt
receiptStandards.rule: Receipts should show the currency of the transaction
Any personal information not required for reimbursement purposes should be removed before submission

compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.grossUpRule: Business expenses related to workers completing their job will usually be tax exempt
Home office costs, including furniture, follow specific tax allowances and rules and are tax exempt when following government rates
Training expenses are generally taxable and will be grossed up
All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax free
Per diem up to 26.40 Euros per day (maximum 12 hours) is tax free. Amounts above 26.40 Euros per day will be grossed up
Lodging paid separately upon receiving proper invoice/receipt is tax free
Flat rate of 15 Euro can be paid for lodging when no receipt is provided - this amount is tax free

compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.expenseType: International per diem within government limits
compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.grossUpRule: Per diem rates based on government limits for each destination are tax free

compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.expenseType: International per diem above government limits
compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.grossUpRule: Amount above the set government per diem rate requires receipt and will be grossed up if not tax exempt
Mileage reimbursement according to government rates is tax free
Parking tickets included within mileage payment are tax free
If parking is paid outside of mileage it will be taxed

compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.additionalInfoRule: Training expenses require the approval of the direct manager
Travel expenses must be submitted using the Travel Expense Report Template Austria EUR.xlsx
Business trip - submit a separate report for each trip
A per diem method cannot be mixed with actual expenses. You will need to agree with the worker on one method per business trip
A per diem method cannot be mixed with actual expenses. You will need to agree with the worker on one method per business trip
Per diem entitlement is for workers who travel more than 25 kilometres from their place of business
To claim mileage, a record of kilometers traveled must be submitted with exact continuous logbook (Fahrtenbuch)
Worker will need to share a map with the relevant route (google maps is sufficient)
Receipts should be submitted with clear exchange rate information and the travel reporting template
Expense reimbursements will be processed within the monthly payroll run and will be reflected in the worker's pay slip
